# Dia Browser Release Notes

## March 2026

**v1.24.0** (March 26, 2026)
- Fixed memory leaks causing performance degradation over time
- Optimized new tab page animations to reduce CPU/GPU usage
- Accelerated command bar suggestion rendering
- Improved system load handling by skipping unnecessary processing steps

**v1.23.0** (March 19, 2026)
- Features focused on review and merge workflows

**v1.22.0** (March 11, 2026)
- "Don't think about the next step. Take it"

**v1.21.0** (March 5, 2026)
- "Before you reach for it…"

Updated: 2026-03-29
